'''tafate''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adverbs|adverb]] meaning "[[Wikt:jurisdictionally|jurisdictionally]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| t-f-p
|-
! Word class
| [[Adverb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:jurisdictionally|jurisdictionally]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| tafate
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].[[present]] || [[word:tafate|tafate]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]] || [[word:tafatesher|tafatesher]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:tafatesherĂ«m|tafatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:tafatero|tafatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:tafateshĂ«|tafateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:tafateshĂ«m|tafateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokitafatero|gokitafatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokitafateshĂ«|gokitafateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokitafateshĂ«m|gokitafateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gotafankerom|gotafankerom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gotafankeshĂ«|gotafankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gotafankeshĂ«m|gotafankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gotafankeya|gotafankeya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:tafaterom|tafaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:tafatemu|tafatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:tafateya|tafateya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokitafaterom|gokitafaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokitafatemu|gokitafatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokitafateya|gokitafateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[present]] || [[word:tafafate|tafafate]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:tafafatesher|tafafatesher]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:tafafatesherĂ«m|tafafatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:tafafatero|tafafatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:tafafateshĂ«|tafafateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:tafafateshĂ«m|tafafateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokitafafatero|gokitafafatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokitafafateshĂ«|gokitafafateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokitafafateshĂ«m|gokitafafateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gotafafankerom|gotafafankerom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gotafafankeshĂ«|gotafafankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gotafafankeshĂ«m|gotafafankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gotafafankeya|gotafafankeya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:tafafaterom|tafafaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:tafafatemu|tafafatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:tafafateya|tafafateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokitafafaterom|gokitafafaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokitafafatemu|gokitafafatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokitafafateya|gokitafafateya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[present]] || [[word:tĂŠfĂŠte|tĂŠfĂŠte]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:tĂŠfĂŠtesher|tĂŠfĂŠtesher]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:tĂŠfĂŠtesherĂ«m|tĂŠfĂŠtesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:tĂŠfĂŠtero|tĂŠfĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:tĂŠfĂŠteshĂ«|tĂŠfĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:tĂŠfĂŠteshĂ«m|tĂŠfĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokitĂŠfĂŠtero|gokitĂŠfĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokitĂŠfĂŠteshĂ«|gokitĂŠfĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokitĂŠfĂŠteshĂ«m|gokitĂŠfĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gotĂŠfĂŠnkerom|gotĂŠfĂŠnkerom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gotĂŠfĂŠnkeshĂ«|gotĂŠfĂŠnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gotĂŠfĂŠnkeshĂ«m|gotĂŠfĂŠnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gotĂŠfĂŠnkeya|gotĂŠfĂŠnkeya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:tĂŠfĂŠterom|tĂŠfĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:tĂŠfĂŠtemu|tĂŠfĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:tĂŠfĂŠteya|tĂŠfĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokitĂŠfĂŠterom|gokitĂŠfĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokitĂŠfĂŠtemu|gokitĂŠfĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokitĂŠfĂŠteya|gokitĂŠfĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[present]] || [[word:tafafte|tafafte]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:tafaftesher|tafaftesher]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:tafaftesherĂ«m|tafaftesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:tafaftero|tafaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:tafafteshĂ«|tafafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:tafafteshĂ«m|tafafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokitafaftero|gokitafaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokitafafteshĂ«|gokitafafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokitafafteshĂ«m|gokitafafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gotafafnkerom|gotafafnkerom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gotafafnkeshĂ«|gotafafnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gotafafnkeshĂ«m|gotafafnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gotafafnkeya|gotafafnkeya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:tafafterom|tafafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:tafaftemu|tafaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:tafafteya|tafafteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokitafafterom|gokitafafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokitafaftemu|gokitafaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokitafafteya|gokitafafteya]]
|}

''76 forms generated.''

== See also ==
